query:
UPDATE portfolioTransactions 
SET pricePerShare = 77.70, 
    totalAmount = shares * 77.70,
    totalAmountCHF = shares * 77.70
WHERE ticker = 'NESN.SW' 
  AND transactionDate = '2025-11-01';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute UPDATE portfolioTransactions

    totalAmount = shares * 77.70,
    totalAmountCHF = shares * 77.70
WHERE ticker = 'NESN.SW' 
  AND transactionDate = '2025-11-01';
